maxJobs.title: Max Jobs
maxJobs.description: Maximum number of job pages to scrape. Set to 0 to scrape all jobs found in the sitemap.

searchQuery.title: Search Query
searchQuery.description: Filter job URLs by keyword (matched against the URL path). Leave empty to scrape all jobs.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify proxy configuration. Residential proxies are recommended for Meta.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of parallel browser tabs. Keep low to avoid rate limiting.
